chunks.text: This document lists technical reports from EECS at UC Berkeley for 1992. Key reports include: Parallel Timing Simulation on a Distributed Memory Multiprocessor (CSD-92-723) by Chih-Po Wen, Hiding Communication Costs in Bandwidth-Limited Parallel FFT Computation (CSD-92-722) by Abhijit Sahay, and Optimal Broadcast and Summation in the LogP Model (CSD-92-721) by Richard Karp, Abhijit Sahay, and Eunice Santos. Other notable reports cover computing the Generalized Singular Value Decomposition, walks on colored graphs, and parallel numerical linear algebra.

Additional reports include: Multiplexing Traffic at the Entrance to Wide-Area Networks (CSD-92-717) by Ramon Caceres, Two Fundamental Limits on Dataflow Multiprocessing (CSD-92-716) by David E. Culler et al., and Analysis of Benchmark Characteristics and Benchmark Performance Prediction (CSD-92-715) by Rafael H. Saavedra and Alan Jay Smith. Input-Output Performance Evaluation (CSD-92-714) by Peter Ming-Chien Chen and LogP: Towards a Realistic Model of Parallel Computation (CSD-92-713) by David E. Culler et al. are also listed.

Reports on storage and file systems include: An Analysis of File Migration in a Unix Supercomputing Environment (CSD-92-712) by Ethan L. Miller and Randy H. Katz, RAID-II: Design and Implementation of a Large Scale Disk Array Controller (CSD-92-705) by Randy H. Katz et al., and The Design and Implementation of a Log-structured File System (CSD-92-696) by Mendel Rosenblum. Zebra: A Striped Network File System (CSD-92-683) by John H. Hartman and John K. Ousterhout is also notable.

Reports on algorithms and computational methods include: Algorithms for Intersecting Parametric and Algebraic Curves (CSD-92-698) by Dinesh Manocha and James W. Demmel, The Optimal Tree Algorithm for Line Clipping (CSD-92-691) by You-Dong Liang and Brian A. Barsky, and An O(log n) Time Common CRCW PRAM Algorithm for Minimum Spanning Tree (CSD-92-673) by Ramesh Subramonian. Other topics cover mesh generation, interval arithmetic, and convex polygon stabbing.

Reports on circuits and hardware include: Synthesis and Testing of Bounded Wire Delay Asynchronous Circuits from Signal Transition Graphs (M92/140) by Luciano Lavagno, Application-Specific Processors for Numerical Algorithms (M92/139) by Lars E. Thon, and Circuit Simulation for VLSI and Electronic Packaging Design (M92/102) by Shen Lin. Also, SIS: A System for Sequential Circuit Synthesis (M92/41) by E.M. Sentovich et al. and CMOS IC designs for Chua's circuit are mentioned.

Reports on networking and communication include: Guaranteed Performance Communication in High Speed Networks (CSD-92-663) by Dinesh Chandra Verma, Active Messages: a Mechanism for Integrated Communication and Computation (CSD-92-675) by Thorsten von Eicken et al., and Wireless Communication Using Non-Directed Infrared Radiation (M92/133) by John R. Barry. Bridge and router architectures like The Baybridge (M92/91) by N. McKeown et al. are also covered.

Reports on control systems and robotics include: Nonholonomic Control Systems: From Steering to Stabilization with Sinusoids (M92/28) by A.R. Teel et al., Finger-Like Biomechanical Robots (M92/12) by D.C. Deno et al., and Stabilization of Trajectories for Systems with Nonholonomic Constraints (M92/11) by G. Walsh et al. Other topics cover sliding mode control and feedback stabilization for nonlinear systems.

Reports on chaos and nonlinear dynamics include: Chua's Circuit studies such as Chaos Synchronization in Chua's Circuit (M92/111) by Leon O. Chua et al., A Zoo of Strange Attractors from the Canonical Chua's Circuits (M92/87) by Leon O. Chua, and The Genesis of Chua's Circuit (M92/1) by Leon O. Chua. Other reports cover strange attractors, bifurcation analysis, and applications in signal processing and neural networks.

Reports on software and systems include: The POSTGRES User Manual (M92/120) by J. Rhein et al., Memory Management for Synchronous Dataflow Programs (M92/128) by S.S. Bhattacharyya and Edward A. Lee, and A Continuous Media Player (M92/126) by Lawrence A. Rowe and B.C. Smith. Also, LIBTP: Portable, Modular Transactions for UNIX (M92/2) by M. Seltzer and M. Olson and database application development frameworks are discussed.

Reports on manufacturing and CAD tools include: MTCAD: An Integrated Framework of Manufacturing Equipment Models and TCAD (M92/136) by M. Hosseini, Technology Computer-Aided Design Frameworks and the PROSE Implementation (M92/27) by Alexander S.-W. Wong, and IC Design for Manufacturability 1 (M92/17) by Costas J. Spanos et al. Other topics cover lithography simulation, plasma processing, and semiconductor manufacturing optimization.
